points.text: Crescent Biopharma — PD-1 x VEGF bispecific antibody — Lead program in clinical-stage pipeline for solid tumors — Equity inducement awards granted to non-executive employees to advance oncology therapies.

Hemab Therapeutics — sutacimig (HMB-001) — Bispecific antibody for Glanzmann thrombasthenia and Factor VII deficiency — Granted Breakthrough Therapy Designation; first-in-human data for HMB-002 (monovalent) presented at ISTH 2026.
Medicenna Therapeutics secured new U.S. patents covering MDNA113, an anti–PD-1 × IL-2 bifunctional Superkine, reinforcing IP for its bispecific-like cytokine platform.
Johnson & Johnson's TECVAYLI (teclistamab), a BCMA × CD3 bispecific antibody, received a positive CHMP recommendation for combination with daratumumab in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma.

Leads Biolabs partner Dianthus Therapeutics is advancing LBL-047, a bifunctional fusion protein (bispecific mechanism), for Sjögren's disease, SLE, and dermatomyositis following a $62M Series B financing round.

Oblenio Bio secured $62 million in Series B financing led by Pfizer Ventures to advance LBL-051, a tri-specific T-cell engager targeting BCMA, CD19, and CD3, into clinical development for autoimmune diseases.

VERAXA Biotech generated in vitro proof-of-concept data for its BiTAC-ADC platform, a bispecific antibody-drug conjugate technology designed to activate cytotoxicity only upon co-internalization of two precursors into the same cancer cell.

Asimov announced a strategic partnership with McGill University's Goodman Cancer Institute to support the development of next-generation multispecific biologics, explicitly citing AI-powered multispecifics design as a key platform expansion.
Antengene licensed ATG-106, a preclinical CDH6×CD3 bispecific T-cell engager for solid tumors, to K2 Therapeutics in a deal valued at ~$1.96B including milestones and royalties.

Antengene secured $20M in upfront and near-term consideration (cash and minority equity stake) plus ~$960.5M in potential development, regulatory, and sales milestones for the ATG-106 bispecific program.
K2 Therapeutics obtained an option for exclusive global rights (excluding Greater China) to a second undisclosed bispecific T-cell engager candidate from Antengene.

BCMA-directed bispecific antibodies and CAR-T therapies demonstrate superior progression-free survival compared to daratumumab-based triplets in first-relapse relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma (RRMM).
Bispecific antibody-based chemotherapy-free regimens in follicular lymphoma show minimal toxicity and favorable activity in early clinical evaluation.
Crescent Biopharma — PD-1 x VEGF bispecific antibody — Solid tumors — Clinical-stage lead program advancing as single agent and in combination regimens.
Hemab Therapeutics — sutacimig (HMB-001) — Glanzmann thrombasthenia / Factor VII deficiency — Bispecific antibody received Breakthrough Therapy Designation; clinical development ongoing.
Medicenna Therapeutics — MDNA113 — Recurrent Glioblastoma / CNS Tumors — Anti–PD-1 × IL-2 bifunctional Superkine; new U.S. Patent No. 12,590,133 granted for immune cell targeting constructs.

Johnson & Johnson — TECVAYLI (teclistamab) — Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma — BCMA × CD3 bispecific antibody; CHMP positive opinion for combination with daratumumab as potential standard of care.

Dianthus Therapeutics — LBL-047 (DNTH212) — Sjögren's Disease, SLE, Dermatomyositis — Bifunctional fusion protein (bispecific) targeting BDCA2 and BAFF/APRIL; Phase 1 top-line data in healthy volunteers expected 2H 2026.

Oblenio Bio — LBL-051 — Autoimmune Diseases — Tri-specific T-cell engager (BCMA/CD19/CD3) completed preclinical studies showing complete B-cell and plasma cell depletion without cytokine release syndrome; clinical trial initiation planned.

VERAXA Biotech — BiTAC-ADC — Oncology — Validated in vitro proof-of-concept showing dose-dependent killing of 3D tumor spheroids and discrimination between breast cancer and healthy cells via dual-antigen targeting mechanism.

Asimov — AI-powered multispecifics design — Oncology biologics — Launched strategic partnership with McGill University to provide cell line and process development services for complex multispecific therapeutic candidates.
Antengene — ATG-106 — Solid Tumors — Licensed CDH6×CD3 bispecific T-cell engager to K2 Therapeutics; preclinical stage; deal includes $20M upfront and ~$960.5M in milestones.

Antengene — Undisclosed Bispecific TCE — Solid Tumors — Granted K2 Therapeutics option for exclusive global rights (excl. Greater China) to second bispecific candidate; option exercise fee ~$20M plus ~$960.5M in milestones.
Multiple Myeloma Community — BCMA bispecifics — Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma — Phase 3 data confirms outperformance of Dara-based triplets in early relapse settings.
Follicular Lymphoma Community — Bispecific antibodies — Follicular Lymphoma — Phase 3 SWOG S2308 trial (NCT) assessing chemotherapy-free first-line regimen validity.
Crescent Biopharma — Oncology bispecific and ADC pipeline — PD-1 x VEGF bispecific antibody — Clinical-stage; leveraging multiple modalities for solid tumor treatment.
Hemab Therapeutics — Blood coagulation disorder therapies — sutacimig (HMB-001) bispecific antibody — Clinical-stage; Breakthrough Therapy Designation secured for Glanzmann thrombasthenia.

Medicenna Therapeutics — Bispecific-like Superkine platform expansion — MDNA113 (anti–PD-1 × IL-2) + bizaxofusp — Global patent portfolio exceeds 100 active granted patents/applications; U.S. patents issued for IL-4/IL-13 and bifunctional constructs.

Johnson & Johnson — Bispecific antibody commercialization — TECVAYLI (teclistamab) — CHMP recommendation advances teclistamab + daratumumab regimen for R/R multiple myeloma; teclistamab is a BCMA × CD3 bispecific.
Dianthus Therapeutics — Clinical advancement of bispecific fusion protein — LBL-047 — $719M raised via public offering in March 2026; Phase 1 study initiated December 2025.
Leads Biolabs — Strategic partnership for bispecific asset development — LBL-047 — Partnered with Dianthus Therapeutics; secured $62M Series B financing to support clinical progression.
Oblenio Bio — Clinical advancement of tri-specific engagers — LBL-051 — $62M Series B closed June 2026; preclinical data presented at EULAR 2026 supports immune reset mechanism.

VERAXA Biotech — Bispecific ADC platform commercialization — BiTAC-ADC and BiTAC-TCE programs — Presented initial data at AACR 2026; seeking partnering opportunities at BIO International Convention 2026.

Asimov — AI-native synthetic biology for complex biologics — Multispecific design and manufacturing — Partnering with McGill University to bridge discovery-to-manufacturing gap for next-generation multispecific architectures.
Antengene — Bispecific T-cell engager commercialization — ATG-106 + undisclosed bispecific TCE — Secured ~$1.96B deal with K2 Therapeutics; program currently preclinical.

K2 Therapeutics — Expansion of oncology pipeline via licensing — ATG-106 (CDH6×CD3 bispecific) — Acquired global rights (excl. Greater China) to preclinical bispecific T-cell engager for solid tumors.

sutacimig (HMB-001) — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody targeting coagulation factors — Phase: Clinical development — Population: Glanzmann thrombasthenia and Factor VII deficiency — Status: Breakthrough Therapy Designation granted.
Crescent PD-1 x VEGF bispecific — Mechanism: Dual blockade of PD-1 and VEGF pathways — Phase: Clinical — Population: Solid tumors — Strategy: Single agent and combination regimens.

MDNA113 — Mechanism: Anti–PD-1 × IL-2 bifunctional Superkine (bispecific-like) — Phase: Clinical — Population: CNS tumors / Recurrent Glioblastoma — Context: Patents cover immune cell targeting constructs and combination with anti-VEGF agents.

TECVAYLI (teclistamab) — Mechanism: BCMA × CD3 bispecific antibody — Phase: Late-stage/Regulatory — Population: Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma — Comparator: Combination with daratumumab — Status: CHMP positive recommendation for standard of care.

LBL-047 — Mechanism: Bispecific bifunctional fusion protein targeting BDCA2 (deplete pDCs/reduce Type 1 IFN) and BAFF/APRIL (suppress B-cell function) — Phase: 1 — Population: Healthy volunteers (Part A) and SLE patients (Part B) — Endpoints: Safety, PK, and top-line results expected 2H 2026.

LBL-051 — Mechanism: Tri-specific T-cell engager targeting BCMA, CD19, and CD3 — Phase: Preclinical (moving to clinical) — Population: Refractory autoimmune disease models — Results: Complete depletion of peripheral/tissue B-cells and plasma cells; no cytokine release syndrome observed at high exposure.

BiTAC-ADC — Mechanism: Dual-antigen bispecific prodrug activation requiring co-internalization of systemically inactive prodrug and cell-impermeable proactivator — Phase: Preclinical (in vitro) — Population: Breast cancer 3D spheroids — Results: Dose-dependent cytotoxicity with no toxicity in healthy cells.

Multispecific biologics — Mechanism: Engagement of multiple immune and tumor targets simultaneously via complex architectures — Phase: Discovery/IND-enabling — Population: Oncology candidates — Context: Addressing bioproduction challenges for high-titer cell lines in academic settings.

ATG-106 — Mechanism: CDH6×CD3 bispecific T-cell engager — Phase: Preclinical — Population: Solid tumors — Target: CDH6 antigen and CD3 receptor — Status: Licensed to K2 Therapeutics for global development.

BCMA bispecifics — Mechanism: BCMA-directed T-cell engagement — Phase: 3 — Population: First-relapse RRMM — Comparator: Daratumumab-based triplets — Results: Substantial improvement in progression-free survival.

Bispecific antibodies — Mechanism: T-cell redirection (implied) — Phase: 3 (SWOG S2308) — Population: Follicular lymphoma (first-line) — Comparator: Chemotherapy-containing regimens — Results: Minimal toxicity and favorable activity in chemotherapy-free setting.
Crescent Biopharma — Equity inducement awards — 23,550 options granted at $17.57/share — Approved June 10, 2026 for non-executive employees under 2025 Inducement Plan.

Medicenna Therapeutics — Intellectual Property Expansion — MDNA113 (bispecific-like) — Secured U.S. Patent No. 12,590,133 and No. 12,503,496; global portfolio now exceeds 100 active patents/applications.
Johnson & Johnson — Regulatory Milestone — TECVAYLI (teclistamab) — CHMP recommendation for teclistamab + daratumumab combination in R/R multiple myeloma; teclistamab is a BCMA × CD3 bispecific.
Leads Biolabs / Dianthus Therapeutics — $62M oversubscribed Series B financing — LBL-047 — Capital allocated to advance bispecific fusion protein into clinical development for autoimmune diseases.

Oblenio Bio — Closed $62 million Series B financing round — LBL-051 program — Led by Pfizer Ventures with participation from Deep Track Capital, GV, and Aditum Bio; funds allocated for initial clinical development.
VERAXA Biotech — Partnering discussions — BiTAC-ADC and BiTAC-TCE platforms — Engaging at BIO International Convention 2026 to license novel bispecific technology following NASDAQ listing.
Asimov / McGill University — Strategic partnership — Multispecific biologics development — Asimov to provide cell line and process development services for GCI oncology research programs.
Antengene / K2 Therapeutics — Licensing agreement for ATG-106 — Total deal value ~$1.96B; includes $20M upfront, ~$960.5M in milestones, tiered royalties, and minority equity stake.
Hemab Therapeutics — Initial Public Offering — Capital raise — Completed May 2026; raised gross proceeds of $346.7 million; listed on Nasdaq under ticker COAG.
